title: SCHLIES RESOURCE CENTER - 211info
text: SCHLIES RESOURCE CENTER SCHLIES RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop in center for visitors to access case management, information and referral to housing, employment, and healthcare resources as well as connections to other service providers. 470 Highway 99 N Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Low-income and homeless adults without minor children Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 687-5820 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 695-4002 Main phone Main phone (541) 687-5820 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Case/Care Management * Homelessness Issues Homeless Drop In Centers Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
